message:
Dear {{doc.supplier}},

Greetings from {{doc.company}}.

Please find attached our Purchase Order No. {{doc.name}} dated {{doc.transaction_date}} for the supply of the materials as per agreed commercial and technical terms.

We kindly request you to review and confirm acceptance of this purchase order by return email along with the following details:

  1. Product availability status
  2. Expected delivery date / dispatch timeline
  3. Batch details and Certificate of Analysis (COA) for the material to be supplied
  4. Minimum residual shelf life as per PO requirement

Key Terms & Conditions (Summary):

{{doc.terms}}

This purchase order shall be considered legally binding upon your written acceptance or commencement of supply.

We look forward to your prompt confirmation and continued cooperation.
name: PO-Supplier
subject: Dear {{doc.supplier_name}}
